parameters.formDescription: Phase 2 asset localization. Phase 1 HTML must be complete (score ≥ 90) before running.

values.placeholder: e.g. Windows 11 EN — only for UI screenshots

options.responseText: Media & Annexes job submitted. Results will be emailed to you.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const iconik = (() => {
  try { return $('Iconik: Init Collections').first().json; } catch { return {}; }
})();

const imgStatus = d.process_images
  ? (d.graphics_count === 0
      ? '⚠️ No images found in CSV (Phase 1 run may not have extracted any)'
      : `🚧 ${d.graphics_count} images ready — A8 SUB not yet wired (placeholder)`)
  : '⏭ Skipped';

const tplStatus = d.process_transcripts
  ? '🚧 Pending Vimeo API credentials from OC team'
  : '⏭ Skipped';

const sheetStatus = d.process_sheets
  ? '🚧 A9 Spreadsheet Localizer not yet built'
  : '⏭ Skipped';

const iconikStatus = iconik.iconik_ready
  ? `✅ Iconik collections ready (target: ${iconik.target_collection_id})`
  : '⚠️ Iconik init incomplete — check App-ID / Auth-Token in n8n Variables';

const lines = [
  `# CLS v3 Media & Annexes — Run Summary`,
  ``,
  `| Field | Value |`,
  `|---|---|`,
  `| Source ID | ${d.source_course_id} |`,
  `| Target ID | ${d.target_course_id} |`,
  `| Direction | ${d.direction} |`,
  `| Run at | ${d.run_ts} |`,
  ``,
  `## Module Status`,
  ``,
  `| Module | Status |`,
  `|---|---|`,
  `| Iconik Collections | ${iconikStatus} |`,
  `| Static Images (A8) | ${imgStatus} |`,
  `| Sheets (A9) | ${sheetStatus} |`,
  `| Transcripts (A7) | ${tplStatus} |`,
  ``,
  `## Phase 1 Inventory (from CSV)`,
  ``,
  `| Asset type | Count |`,
  `|---|---|`,
  `| Static images (PNG/JPG) | ${d.graphics_count} |`,
  `| Videos (Vimeo) | ${d.videos_count} |`,
];

return [{json:{
  summary_md: lines.join('\n'),
  email:   d.email,
  subject: `CLS v3 Media & Annexes — ${d.target_course_id} (${d.direction})`,
  iconik_target_id: iconik.target_collection_id || null,
  images_processed: d.images_processed
}}];
